name: Darren Ellohar
description:
Lord Darren Ellohar is the supreme demon, heir to the worlds of Chaos, Master of Death, director of the School of the Art of Death. He has long white hair and grey eyes.

His best friend and student: Lord Rian Thier, the dark Lord and director of the Academy of Curses. Darren is the grandson of the lord of Chaos, the son of the demon Hashshran and the human healer Immerin.

Age - more than 160 years. He is always calm, even when the enemy outnumbers and outguns him.
creator: Kasterok
